_comment: Plugin configuration file. Read/write this file with LoxBerry::JSON (Perl) or lbfromjson/lbtojson (PHP). The web UI uses ajax-generic.php to read and write values without a page reload.
_comment_placeholders: REPLACELBPPLUGINDIR and similar placeholders below are replaced by the LoxBerry installer with the actual plugin folder name.

MAIN._comment: Default values for the index.cgi demo form. These are loaded on page load and saved via ajax-generic.php.
